prompt: style: Cinematic Realism v1, mood: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting, color palette: warm highlights, cool shadows. scene: Apartment Kitchen Night. red fridge, wooden table, rainy window. lighting: dim warm lamp + blue moonlight. character (charA_v1): short_black, white_hoodie + black_jeans, silver_ring_left_hand. prop (mug_red_v1): state: story_clue, visually consistent. 照片角落站着一个女人，脸被雨水一样的划痕抹掉。, 林澈低声说：妈妈？. Narration: "照片角落站着一个女人，脸被雨水一样的划痕抹掉。". 林澈 says: "妈妈？". Camera motion: high angle shot, downward perspective, surveillance or top-down feel. continuity locks: charA_v1 (location: apartment_kitchen_or_hallway, pose: listening); mug_red_v1 (location: near_main_character, state: warm_and_unexplained). cinematic realistic suspense comic panel, stable young Chinese man identity, rainy old apartment, red mug as recurring clue, coherent low-cost storyboard frame. Stable visual consistency across entire clip. No character drift, no prop mutation, no scene layout shift.
negative: cartoon, neon cyberpunk (unless explicitly requested), sunlight, daylight, modern led lights, crowd, text artifacts, logo, watermark, extra fingers, face drift, face morphing, character drift, outfit change, prop mutation, scene layout shift, distorted limbs, burnt-in subtitles, motion blur excessive, flickering, framing jump cut
motion: high angle shot, downward perspective, surveillance or top-down feel
tool_hint: Copy "prompt" and "negative" into video generation tool. Upload "condition_images" for img2vid start/end frame conditioning if supported. Duration is a guideline.
